hero.label: // platform for teachers and students
hero.subtitle: Groups, lessons, assignments, attendance and finances — solo or with students. Any subject. One tool instead of ten tabs and spreadsheets.
hero.term1: create a group or add a student

pain.label: // the pain
pain.title: Students in a notebook, debts in Excel, «who paid?» in chats.
pain.text: The more students you have, the more tabs. You forget to mark, lose track, miscalculate. Your evening goes to reconciling spreadsheets, not preparing lessons.
pain.solution: LinguaFlow brings it all into one screen: groups, attendance, assignments and balance are calculated for you.
pain.note: and all this — for a single group

features.label: // what it does
features.title: Let's break it down — exactly what you do inside
features.r1title: Groups, schedule and lessons — on autopilot
features.r1p1: Create a group, set the schedule — lessons for 3 months ahead are generated automatically.
features.r1p2: Each lesson has a topic, description, materials (links/text) and a video-call link.
features.r1p3: A group has a link to an external chat (Telegram/WhatsApp) — the student joins in one click.
features.r1mono: a duplicate lesson at the same date/time? the system won't let you create it.
features.r2title: You mark it — the student confirms
features.r2p1: You mark presence with checkboxes. The student confirms on their side — disputes are highlighted.
features.r2p2: The lesson fee is added to the balance automatically at the group's price.
features.r2p3: For students without an account, the mark counts instantly — solo tracking with no extra steps.
features.r2mono: present=true → + lesson price to balance, automatically.
features.r3p1: An assignment for a specific lesson with a deadline (group or individual).
features.r3p2: The student submits a file (or just a comment) right in the app.
features.r3p3: Grade 0–100, visible to the student; everything in one list with statuses.
features.r3mono: statuses: not submitted · overdue · under review · graded.
features.r4title: The balance calculates itself — from attendance
features.r4p1: Balance = charged (attendance) − paid. Per student and per teacher.
features.r4p2: Record a payment manually (cash/transfer) — the balance recalculates instantly.
features.r4p3: Overpayment doesn't go negative — you see the real picture.
features.r4mono: no monthly spreadsheets — the number is always up to date.
features.attNote: The student confirms on their side — disputes show up instantly.
features.finNote: Calculated from attendance — nothing to reconcile by hand.

modes.label: // two modes
modes.subtitle: The same student can grow from a simple entry into a full account — without losing any history.
modes.aTitle: Run it yourself, no student sign-up
modes.aText: Add a student as an entry — just a name and contact. They get nothing, no account needed. Attendance and balance are calculated just like for a regular student.
modes.bTitle: Connect students — they see their own
modes.bText: Find a student by username and send an invitation to the group. They accept — and see the schedule, assignments, attendance, balance and chat. The previous entry can be moved to their account with all the history.
modes.b1: found a student by username → invited
modes.b2: student accepted → they're in the group
modes.b3: moved the history to their account

studentView.label: // the student side
studentView.title1: The student opens the app and
studentView.text: No more «send me the schedule» or «how much do I owe?». Everything that concerns them — on one screen, on mobile.
studentView.f1d: upcoming lessons with a video-call link
studentView.f2d: what's assigned, by when, what grade
studentView.f3d: their own — can confirm or dispute

forWhom.label: // who it's for
forWhom.title: Who it genuinely makes life easier for
forWhom.note: not «for everyone at once» — but for a specific way of teaching
forWhom.c1quote: «I teach 12 people, none of them are in the system — and they don't need to be».
forWhom.c1story: Add everyone as entries, mark attendance — the app calculates who owes what. No student sign-up needed, everything on your screen.
forWhom.c2quote: «Three groups, schedule, assignments and money — used to be in four places».
forWhom.c2story: Groups with a schedule generate lessons automatically, assignments and attendance in one list, balance per student in real time. Your evening goes back to teaching, not spreadsheets.
forWhom.c3quote: «Students see their own — they stopped asking me for the schedule».
forWhom.c3story: Invite a student by username — they see lessons, assignments, attendance, balance and the group chat. The video-call link is right in the lesson card.

faq.label: // frequently asked
faq.title: About the platform, in short
faq.subtitle: Answers to the questions that come up before signing up.
faq.note: Still have questions? Sign up and try it — it's free and takes a couple of minutes.
faq.a1: A teacher's workspace. Groups, schedule, lessons, homework, attendance and finances — in one place, instead of a dozen tabs, chats and spreadsheets. You always see who owes what, what's assigned and who submitted, who was in class. If they wish, a student gets a personal portal with schedule, grades, materials and progress.
faq.a2: The basic plan is free — enough to run your first students. For unlimited work there's the Pro plan. Subscription payments are coming soon; for now the limits don't block your work.
faq.q3: Can I run it solo, without student sign-ups?
faq.a3: Yes. Add a student as an entry — just a name and contact, without their involvement. Run the schedule and attendance, the balance is calculated automatically. When needed, the history can be moved to the student's personal account without losing data.
faq.q4: Where does it work and do I need to install anything?
faq.a4: In any browser — on a computer, tablet and phone. Nothing to install. If you wish, the app can be added to your phone's home screen (PWA).
faq.q5: Do I need technical skills or my own website?
faq.a5: No. Signing up and working require no setup, coding or a website of your own. The interface is clear from the first visit.
faq.q6: Are the teacher's and students' data safe?
faq.a6: Yes. Each teacher sees only their own — their groups, their students and their finances. Data is isolated; access to others' information is impossible.
faq.a7: In a few minutes. Signing up takes about a minute; then you create a group or add a student — and start teaching right away.

footer.tagline: A teacher's workspace. Groups, assignments, attendance and finances — in one place, for any subject.

forStudents.label: // are you a student?
forStudents.title: Studying with a teacher on LinguaFlow?
forStudents.text: Create a student account — and keep everything in one place. Your teacher invites you to the group by username, and you instantly see the schedule, assignments and your progress.
forStudents.teacherNote: Are you a teacher? Everything above on this page is for you.
